name: Chicken Jambonette Stuffed with Gouda
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken thighs, boneless with skin pounded flat
8 oz Gouda cheese, cut into 6 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Sauté mushrooms until they are browned on the edges.
3. Add shallots, garlic, carrots, and parsley to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes.
4. Pour in white wine and port wine, then add cream. Reduce the mixture by half and season with salt and pepper.
5. Stir in bread crumbs and let the mixture cool.
6. Divide the stuffing evenly onto each chicken thigh and top with Gouda cheese.
7. Roll up the chicken thighs tightly and secure with string.
8. Heat olive oil and butter in a separate skillet over medium heat.
9. Brown the tops of the chicken thighs on all sides.
10. Transfer the chicken to an oven-safe dish and roast at 400°F (200°C) for 18 minutes or until the meat is cooked through.
